everything you need

One app.
Dinner solved.

Nourish handles every part of the home cooking process — so you can stop thinking about it and start cooking.

Plan your whole week in minutes.

No more scrambling at 5pm wondering what to make. Set up your week on Sunday and dinner is decided — every single night.

  • ✓Plan breakfast, lunch, and dinner for every day of the week
  • ✓AI-suggested meals based on your dietary preferences and restrictions
  • ✓Leftover tracking — make extra and Nourish plans it into your week
  • ✓Meal prep mode for batch cooking Sundays
  • ✓Save meals for next week with one tap

Hundreds of recipes — and growing every week.

Nourish launches with hundreds of handpicked home cooking recipes across every meal type — and we're just getting started. This is a living, growing library that will expand to thousands of recipes over time, with new additions added regularly. From quick weeknight dinners to weekend brunch, comfort food classics to healthy options, there's always something new to cook.

  • ✓Hundreds of recipes across mains, breakfast, snacks, desserts, and drinks — growing to thousands
  • ✓Filter by meal type: breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks, dessert, drinks
  • ✓Collections: 30 Min or Less, Comfort Food, Healthy & Light, One-Pan Wonders
  • ✓Save favorites to your personal recipe library
  • ✓Import any recipe from the web or a photo with one tap
  • ✓Create and submit your own recipes to the community

Your personal AI kitchen assistant.

Chef Nouri knows your dietary restrictions, your cooking skill level, and what you've been making. Ask anything — get real, personalized, actionable answers instantly.

  • ✓Build a 7-day meal plan tailored to your family in one conversation
  • ✓Get meal suggestions based on what you already have at home
  • ✓Modify any recipe to fit your exact dietary needs
  • ✓Answer cooking questions in real time — substitutions, techniques, timing
  • ✓5PM Panic Button — instant dinner ideas when you have no plan
  • ✓Always respects your allergens and restrictions — automatically

Step-by-step cooking guidance.

Cook Mode walks you through every recipe step by step — with built-in timers, auto-scaled ingredients, and a hands-free experience designed for the kitchen.

  • ✓Clear step-by-step instructions with built-in countdown timers
  • ✓Ingredients auto-scale perfectly to your serving size
  • ✓Make extra for leftovers — 1x, 2x, or 3x batch multiplier
  • ✓Earn XP and track your cooking streak as you go
  • ✓Mix Mode for cocktails and drinks — same guided experience

Smart grocery lists, built automatically.

Your meal plan instantly becomes an organized grocery list — sorted by store category, with everything you need and nothing you don't.

  • ✓Auto-generate grocery lists directly from your weekly meal plan
  • ✓Organized by store category — produce, meat, dairy, pantry, and more
  • ✓Nutrition lookup for any item, powered by USDA data
  • ✓Check items off as you shop, in real time
  • ✓Track how many meals out you're allowing yourself vs. cooking at home

Every recipe adapts to your family's needs. Automatically.

Whether you're gluten-free, dairy-free, vegan, keto, or managing a serious food allergy — Nourish doesn't just filter recipes, it rewrites them to fit your exact needs. Set your restrictions once and every single recipe in the app adapts to you, your family, and anyone at your table.

No more searching for "gluten-free version" of a recipe online. No more worrying if a dish is safe for someone at the table. Nourish handles it — automatically, every time.

  • ✓Supports gluten-free, dairy-free, vegan, vegetarian, keto, paleo, nut-free, egg-free, carnivore, and more
  • ✓Any recipe can be auto-adapted — ingredients swapped, steps rewritten to match
  • ✓Allergen warnings on every recipe so nothing slips through
  • ✓Chef Nouri always respects your restrictions in every suggestion it makes
  • ✓Short-term diet support — Ramadan, Whole30, cleanses, low-carb windows
  • ✓Save your adapted version as your own recipe to cook again
how it works

Three steps.
Dinner done.

Nourish turns the most stressful part of your week into a five-minute Sunday routine.

01

Plan your week

Tell Nourish your dietary needs and let Chef Nouri suggest a full 7-day meal plan — or build your own from hundreds of recipes.

02

Shop with your list

Your meal plan instantly becomes an organized grocery list, sorted by store section. Check items off as you go.

03

Cook with confidence

Cook Mode walks you through every step with timers, scaled ingredients, and guidance. Just follow along and cook.

common questions

Got questions?

When does Nourish launch?
Nourish is launching in September 2026. Join the waitlist to be the first to know — and lock in your founding member discount before spots fill up.
Is Nourish free?
Nourish has a generous free tier with access to the full recipe library and Chef Nouri (5 messages per week). Nourish Pro unlocks unlimited Chef Nouri, full health tracking, and all premium features for $7.99/month or $59.99/year — less than the cost of one skipped takeout meal.
What is a Founding Member?
The first 100 people to join the waitlist become Founding Members and get 50% off Nourish Pro for life — not just the first month, forever. Once those 100 spots are filled, this offer is gone permanently.
What diets and allergies does Nourish support?
Nourish supports gluten-free, dairy-free, vegan, vegetarian, keto, paleo, nut-free, egg-free, carnivore, and more. But what makes Nourish different is that it doesn't just filter recipes — it actually adapts them. Set your restrictions once and Nourish rewrites ingredient lists and cooking steps to fit your exact needs, for every recipe in the app.
What is Chef Nouri?
Chef Nouri is your built-in AI kitchen assistant. You can ask it to plan your week, suggest meals based on what's in your fridge, modify any recipe for your diet, answer cooking questions, or give you instant dinner ideas when you're stuck at 5pm. Chef Nouri knows your restrictions, your cooking history, and your preferences — so every suggestion is actually relevant to you.
How many recipes does Nourish have?
Nourish launches with hundreds of handpicked home cooking recipes across every meal type. But this is just the beginning — Nourish is designed to grow. We'll be adding new recipes regularly, and our goal is to build a library of thousands of recipes over time. You can also import any recipe from the web or create your own.
Is Nourish available on Android?
Nourish is launching first on iOS in September 2026. Android is on the roadmap after launch. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know as soon as Android is available.
Where can I follow along?
We're building Nourish in public and sharing the whole process on TikTok and Instagram @thenourishapp. Follow along for behind-the-scenes updates, early feature previews, and cooking content.
